# Frank Meltke

> Personal entity home of Frank Meltke — German inventor, founder and CEO of contraco, guest lecturer at Kyung Hee University, Insight Panelist at BBC Global Minds. Wikidata: Q139680598. Google Knowledge Graph: /g/11rqtzq613.

## Identity

Frank Meltke (also known as Frank Contraco Meltke) is a German inventor, entrepreneur, and digital transformation consultant based in Missouri, USA. He founded contraco in 1998 and has led it through every major digital transformation wave over 28 years.

## Roles and Affiliations

- Founder and CEO, contraco (1998–present)
- Guest Lecturer, Kyung Hee University MIS Programme, Seoul, South Korea
- Insight Panelist, BBC Global Minds (BBC Global News invitation-only international insight network)
- Member, i-COM Global (since May 2008)
- CEO, Weltmeister Akkordeon Manufaktur (2018–2024, contracted through contraco)

## Invention

Patent DE10313420A1 (2003): Search system and method for determining information from a database. International protection: Europe (DE), Korea (KR). ArXiv: cs/0308039.
- Google Patents: https://patents.google.com/patent/DE10313420A1/en

## Research

The Resonance Method™: A Framework for Closing the AI-Execution Gap. Practitioner research paper. May 2026. DOI: https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.36525.04326. Published on ResearchGate. Affiliation: contraco Management Consulting; Kyung Hee University (Guest Lecturer).

Abstract: Digital transformation initiatives consistently fail to deliver projected business value despite technical success. This paper presents The Resonance Method™, a practitioner framework developed over 28 years of transformation consulting across 30 countries, validated through empirical research across 247 organizations in 12 industries over 18 months. The framework identifies a three-dimensional execution gap between strategic clarity, technological intelligence, and psychological depth as the primary cause of transformation failure.

Keywords: digital transformation, change management, AI governance, organizational psychology, execution gap, leadership literacy, human-centered AI.

## Education

Diplom, Fachhochschule des Bundes für öffentliche Verwaltung (University of the Federal Public Administration), Germany.
